response: The 2007 documentary "Zoo" was more successful than the 1998 documentary "Divine Trash." "Zoo" was selected as one of the top five American films to be presented at the Directors' Fortnight sidebar at the 2007 Cannes Film Festival, and it won a prize at the Sundance Film Festival. "Divine Trash" was a 1998 documentary film directed by Steve Yeager about John Waters. While both films are notable, "Zoo" achieved greater recognition and success in its initial release.
